name: akshar
description: Akshar — Lyricist & Story Writer Platform (MERN Stack)

scripts.dev: npx kill-port 5173 5000 --silent 2>nul & concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
